suffix (rarely populated) 
Null = Not applicable, beneficiary not in an LTC setting (or in the first two months of 2013, the 
presumption is there was greater than a 14-day supply) 

COMMENT: CMS requires Part D plans to have drug utilization management programs to encourage compliance 
with the formulary; this variable is designed to make it easier to monitor how well LTC pharmacies 
comply with formularies
